# Generated documentation (do not edit by hand)

This folder and related API artifacts are produced by `npm run docs:generate` (see `docs/en/quality/generated-documentation.md`).

| Output | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `typedoc/` | HTML reference from TypeScript (`typedoc`, entry points `src/`, `server/`, `server.ts`). |
| `schema-json/` | JSON Schema files extracted from `docs/api/openapi.yaml` (`components.schemas`). |
| `schema-md/` | Markdown from `@adobe/jsonschema2md` for those schemas. |

**Source of truth:** application code, `docs/api/openapi.yaml`, and tests — not these files.

Regenerate after changes to code, OpenAPI, or production dependencies, and commit the result in the same PR as the change.
